pages.title: Still Me? Still You
pages.tagline: A sultry duet for digital dreams and midnight calls.

pages.body: Step into a late-night lounge where text messages ignite quiet flames. This intimate island-world breathes with trip-hop grooves and dark piano, weaving uncertainty through long-distance love. Listen to the male lead question his place in your future while smoky synth pads fill the silence between sent pings. Then, catch the sweet soulful female response, her warmth cutting through digital distance like a gentle reassurance. From breathy doubts to passionate duets, this journey resolves into resolved intimacy. It is a tender exploration of self-doubt versus commitment, proving that even across miles and screens, the connection remains electric.
pages.styleSentence: A sultry theatrical cabaret-R&B duet at 118 BPM featuring male/female back-and-forth vocals over a warm trip-hop groove with dark lounge piano, brushed drums, and smoky synth pads that creates an intimate island-night atmosphere.

pages.text:
[Male - Verse 1]
The screen lights up and I see your name
midnight turns into a little flame
I start typing, then I erase
like I’m standing right in front of your face
[SFX: typing clicks in tempo]
[Male - Text 1]
Is it still me that makes you smile
when my name shows up after a while?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Male - Text 2]
Is it still me that makes you pause
before you answer just because?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Male - Text 3]
Is it still me in your quiet room
when the night gets sweet and the lights go blue?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Male - Text 4]
Is it still me that makes you sweat?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Male - Text 5]
Is it still me you almost say
when you miss the hands that are far away?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Male - Text 6]
Is it still me in your future plans
when you close your eyes and reach for my hands?
[SFX: sent chime]
[SFX: long silence, low bass swell]
[SFX: received ping]
[Female - Re-reading, Softly]
Still smiling when your name appears…
still pausing like you’re standing here…
still thinking of you when the lights go blue…
still feeling the heat from across the room…
[Female - Verse 2]
You send questions like little sparks
landing soft in the dark
I read them once, then twice again
like every word knows where I’ve been
[SFX: typing clicks, delicate and rhythmic]
[Female - Answer 1]
Yes, it’s still you that makes me smile
even from a thousand miles
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Answer 2]
Yes, it’s still you that makes me wait
just to feel my heartbeat change
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Answer 3]
Yes, it’s still you when the lights go low
and I miss the voice I already know
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Answer 4]
Yes, it’s still you that makes me sweat
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Answer 5]
Yes, it’s still you I want beside me
not just calling, not just typing
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Answer 6]
Yes, it’s still you in the life I see
but now I have some questions for me
[SFX: received ping]
[Chorus - Duet]
Is it still me?
Is it still you?
In the late-night glow when the screen turns blue
Is it still us?
Do we still feel true?
With a whole wide world in between us two
Is it still me?
Is it still you?
When the bass rolls soft and the moon comes through
Send me your heart, I’ll send mine too
Is it still me?
Baby, it’s still you
[Female - Text Round Begins]
[SFX: typing clicks return, faster now]
[Female - Text 1]
Is it still me that makes you dream
when you’re tired of every little thing?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Text 2]
Is it still me you want to call
when your big plans start to feel too tall?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Text 3]
Is it still me you’re building for
when you save a little more and more?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Text 4]
Is it still me you want to hold
when New York nights get loud and cold?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Text 5]
Is it still me that slows your mind
when the whole world runs overtime?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Text 6]
Is it still me you’re coming home to
when the miles finally let us through?
[SFX: sent chime]
[SFX: silence, then received ping]
[Male - Re-reading, Tender]
Still dreaming when the world gets heavy…
still calling when my plans get messy…
still building, still saving, still choosing you…
still hearing your voice when the night turns blue…
[Male - Answer Verse]
Yes, it’s still you when I lose my way
you’re the calm in the noise of the day
Yes, it’s still you when I count what’s left
trying to become my very best
Yes, it’s still you when the city screams
still you in the center of all my dreams
Yes, it’s still you that I’m running to
every changed habit is a road to you
[Bridge - Duet, Call and Response]
[Female]
Then don’t just say it
[Male]
I’ll prove it slow
[Female]
Don’t just promise
[Male]
Watch me grow
[Female]
Don’t just miss me
[Male]
I’ll make it real
[Female]
Then tell me again
[Male]
You know how I feel
[Final Chorus - Duet, Bigger]
Is it still me?
Is it still you?
In the late-night glow when the screen turns blue
Is it still us?
Do we still feel true?
With a whole wide world in between us two
Is it still me?
Is it still you?
When the bass rolls soft and the moon comes through
Send me your heart, I’ll send mine too
Is it still me?
Baby, it’s still you
[Outro - Sound Design]
[SFX: typing, slow and intimate]
[Male - Text]
Still me?
[SFX: sent chime]
[Female - Text]
Still you.
[SFX: sent chime]
[Duet - Whispered]
Still us.
[SFX: received ping]
[Deep bass fades like a heartbeat]

pages.caption: A smoky island-night lounge where text messages spark digital flames over warm trip-hop grooves and dark piano.

pages.vocalStyle: breathy Latin male lead paired with sweet soulful Filipino female counterpoint

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking gently but firmly.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Shadows dance in time with every beat.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Grooves low and deep through the night.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints smoky clouds around your head.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Adds texture to every quiet corner.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Plucks warm chords on velvet strings.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Pianist sets a dark lounge mood.
